title: The Underworld Stirs
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #1, Dorry, Unknown person #11, Gerd, Unknown person #12 as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry for always going out drinking, Mom!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ma, I shouldn't have forgotten to take out the trash!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me for eating the honey cake meant for our guests!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: chiefs, this is bad! The island clouds have drifted away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GIHA ha. The ship of the mighty giant warrior pirates just crashed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The odds seem to only get worse for those brats!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's keep this brief, I am now addressing the legendary warrior, mountain beard JARUL!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: No... Dorry and Brogy Couldn't have!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seeing as the King's gone, you will speak for Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It can't be?! The giant warrior pirates' Swal crashed?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope the chiefs are safe. Let's hurt!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You giants will serve as our battle thralls.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Otherwise, we'll see just how valuable these brats are as hostages.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure you're all curious about the ten kids and where they're going, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have the names of the kidnapped children...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A dream!! This is just a dream!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know I'm strong, but I can't stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's okay! Everything'll work out in the end!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did it have to be my daughter?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were on branch 8, right? I'll go save her myself!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
